case_title: MARTEL, JADE LISA VS MCBRIDE, BRIAN G.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTEL, JADE LISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCBRIDE, BRIAN G. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WAIVES PROPER SERVICE ON CLAIMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MCBRIDE, BRIAN G. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MARTEL, JADE LISA $425.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $447.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
